scripts.dev: npm run build:content && npm run validate:content && npm run validate:art && vite --configLoader runner
scripts.playtest:dev: npm run build:content && npm run validate:content && npm run validate:art && vite --configLoader runner --host 0.0.0.0 --strictPort
scripts.build: npm run build:content && npm run validate:content && npm run validate:art && vite build --configLoader runner
scripts.playtest:preview: npm run build && vite preview --configLoader runner --host 0.0.0.0 --strictPort --port 4173
